leadText: Leafage (Japanese: このは Foliage) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Leafage inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Leafage's PP was reduced to 25. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves. ZA The user attacks by pelting targets with leaves.
